name: Swedish Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter for 3-5 minutes over moderate heat until it becomes limp.
2. Mix the remaining meatball ingredients well with the onions and shape into 3/4-inch to 1-inch balls using a cookie scoop dipped in ice water between batches.
3. Brown the meatballs in batches, about 8-10 minutes each, in butter in a large, heavy skillet over moderate heat until they are thoroughly cooked.
4. Drain on paper towels.
5. Add melted butter to the skillet and stir in flour until well mixed.
6. Gradually add cream and continue heating while stirring until thickened.
7. Season with salt and white pepper, then add the meatballs and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve with wide egg noodles.
Per serving: 519 Calories; 44g Fat (77% calories from fat); 21g Protein; 8g Carbohydrate; 172mg Cholesterol; 1024mg Sodium
